name: Wobubble
tagline: Simple floating/bubble-ish animation. Just drag-and-drop. No keyframing a single node by hand.
description: Wobubble is a free DaVinci Resolve Fusion macro for placing and styling speech bubbles without hand-keyframing nodes. Drop it in, point it, size it, done.

faq.question: It's not showing up in my Effects Library
faq.answer: Make sure you fully quit and reopened Resolve, not just closed the project. Fusion only scans templates on launch.

faq.question: Does this work on Windows/Mac?
faq.answer: Yes — both Windows and Mac. The .drfx is cross-platform; install the same way on either.

faq.question: Is this really free?
faq.answer: Yes. No license key, no watermark, no trial period. Made and shared as part of Coded Citadel.

seo.title: Wobubble — Free DaVinci Resolve Fusion Macro | Coded Citadel
seo.description: Free DaVinci Resolve Fusion macro for speech bubbles. Drag, drop, style — no hand-keyframing. Download Wobubble.drfx for Resolve 18+.

modal.title: Your download's starting
modal.description: Wobubble is free, always will be. If it saves you time, the best thanks is following along - that's what keeps these coming.
